self_report.reflection: Equal areas means ∫₀^{x₂}(c − (2x−3x³))dx = 0, giving c = x₂ − (3/4)x₂³. Combined with c = 2x₂ − 3x₂³ from the curve, this forces x₂ = 2/3 and c = 4/9. Both x₁ ≈ 0.244 and x₂ = 2/3 straddle the peak x = √2/3 ≈ 0.471, confirming the geometry.
self_report.notes: Independent algebraic derivation reproduces c = 4/9 exactly.
